title: New Big Trees
description: The trees will generate vanilla wooden blocks as trunk, and the chance of sapling dropping is 0.5%, whether jungle or orhers.
body:
The chance 1/16 means per 16 chunks generate 1 tree, etc.
### 
The blocks may block the tree generation, so reality generation chance will be lower.
- The nb baobab tree generated in savanna-like biome, chance is 1/16.
- The nb birch tree generated in birch forest-like biome, chance is 1/16.
- The nb cherry tree generated in moutain-like biome, chance is 1/32. Can replace blocks.
- The nb dark oak tree generated in dark forest biome, chance is 1/4.
- The nb jungle tree generated in jungle-like biome, chance is 1/16. Can replace blocks.
- The nb oak tree generated in forest-like biome, chance is 1/16.
- The nb redwood tree generated in taiga-like biome, chance is 1/16.
- The nb blue tree floating generated in soul sand vally and warped forest biome, chance is 1/8.
- The nb crimson tree floating generated in nether wastedland and crimson forest biome, chance is 1/8.
- The nb golden tree floating generated in nether, chance is 1/16.
- The nb magnificent tree generated in swamp-like biome, chance is 1/16.
- The nb root tree generated in plain-like biome, chance is 1/32.
- The nb white tree generated in hill-like biome, chance is 1/32. Can replace blocks.
- The nb sacred tree generated in old-growth-like biome, chance is 1/32. Can replace blocks.
- The nb pine tree generated in end barren biome, chance is 1/32. Can replace blocks.
- The nb purple tree generated in end midland biome, chance is 1/64.
****
The foods don't provide Hunger values and Saturation, but they have effets, and can eat even if full Hunger.
- Suger sapling: Restore 20 HP, which equals to 10 red heart.
- Sapling souffle: Restore 40 hunger values, which equals to 20 chicken.
- Night vision carrot: Give 1:00 Night vision effect.
- Charcoal powder: Decrease 21 hunger valuse, which equals to 10.5 chicken.
- Slow falling leaves: Give 1:00 Slow falling effect.
- Ominous apple: Give 1:00 Bad omen V effect.
- Lonsdaleite apple: Give 1:00 regeneration IV effect.
- Steel Bone: Give 1:00 Absorption 14 effect, equals to 60 HP or 30 golden heart.
****
The coke oven costs 10s to smelt items, it doesn't need fuel, and doesn't provide exp. The recipe is controled by Datapack, there is the defaule recipes:
- A log to a charcoal, include fire resistant logs like nether stems.
- A coal to a coke.
- A stick to a pinch of charcoal.
- A bamboo to a pinch of charcoal.
****
The nb enchanted tree and nb sacred tree is insprred by MFR2 MOD. The tree growed by sapling which called nb enchanted tree, is bigger than nature generated which called nb sacred tree. The crown always at world Y 120 to 319, and the trunk will from sapling hight to world Y 317, it means crown may lower than trunk bottom when you plant the sapling higher than world Y 120.
### 
Aften the enchanted sapling grow, you'd better to close your aechive and join it again, force the game do blocks update, deal with ghost blocks. The enchanted leaves don't drop sticks, to reduce dropping items.
****
Both Steel block, Coke oven, Black diamond block, Lonsdaleite block can block the Piston. Black diamond block and Lonsdaleite block has explode resistance as Obsidian.
****
The lite edition wouldn't generate the trees in world, but you can use with datagen datapack to config the generation rate. You can also directly uncompress and edit the jar form MOD file, they has the same content about data generation.
### 
If you don't want generate specified trees, you can delete the relevant JSON files from \data\newbigtrees\neoforge\biome_modifier\ path. The code in files line 3 "biomes" can be seted if you know the biome id.
### 
The JSON files in \data\newbigtrees\worldgen\placed_feature\ can be used to config the generation rate.
- The generation rate in overworld and the end is a mixed number, the code in files line 10 "data" is the integer part, the code in files line 11 "weight" is the denominator minus 1 (15 means 1/16, 7 means 1/8, etc.),and the code in files line 14 "data" is the sum of the integer part and the numerator. 
- The generation rate of nether trees decided by line 6 "chance" in the JSON files, it is the denominator.
****
Recommended to install ferritecore MOD and ScalableLux MOD. Don't compatible with C2ME MOD and Lithium MOD. If you has installed Sodium MOD, better to keep "Performance / Thunk Update Thread" default, force max threads may cause out of memory.
****
You can freely use the mod in modpacks.
### 
You can also edit and build the souce code to fit your modpacks.
****
中文说明请参考MC百科。
